$comment: A sheet: the desired orchestra (Sections > Stands > Canisters), where each canister references an authorized WASM by `wasm_key`. Sheets hold no template definitions (see seed/templates.json). Deploying a sheet is idempotent: missing sections/stands/canisters are created (reusing pooled canisters), canisters no longer listed are retired back to the pool. Mirror of src/default_sheet.py.
name: demo
description: Default Casals demo orchestra: a Demo section with one stand per language (Motoko, Rust, Python), each running a backend canister plus a certified-assets frontend canister.

sections.name: Demo
sections.description: Neutral demo section: one full-stack stand per supported backend language.

stands.name: Motoko
stands.description: Motoko hello-world backend + a certified-assets frontend.

stands.name: Rust
stands.description: Rust hello-world backend + a certified-assets frontend.

stands.name: Python
stands.description: Basilisk (Python) hello-world backend + a certified-assets frontend.
